'''zhajasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doating|doating]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doating|doating]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhajasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjæshæth|zhæjæshæth]] || [[word:zhæjæshæj|zhæjæshæj]] || [[word:zhæjæshæsh|zhæjæshæsh]] || [[word:zhæjæshæ|zhæjæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajajashath|zhajajashath]] || [[word:zhajajashaj|zhajajashaj]] || [[word:zhajajashash|zhajajashash]] || [[word:zhajajasha|zhajajasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajashath|zhajashath]] || [[word:zhajashaj|zhajashaj]] || [[word:zhajashash|zhajashash]] || [[word:zhajasha|zhajasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajafshath|zhajafshath]] || [[word:zhajafshaj|zhajafshaj]] || [[word:zhajafshash|zhajafshash]] || [[word:zhajafshaf|zhajafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajashatha|zhajashatha]] || [[word:zhajashaja|zhajashaja]] || [[word:zhajashasha|zhajashasha]] || [[word:zhajashaka|zhajashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajashath|zhajashath]] || [[word:zhajashaj|zhajashaj]] || [[word:zhajashash|zhajashash]] || [[word:zhajasha|zhajasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajashathal|zhajashathal]] || [[word:zhajashajal|zhajashajal]] || [[word:zhajashashal|zhajashashal]] || [[word:zhajashakal|zhajashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajashathatha|zhajashathatha]] || [[word:zhajashajaja|zhajashajaja]] || [[word:zhajashashasha|zhajashashasha]] || [[word:zhajashaka|zhajashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajashathan|zhajashathan]] || [[word:zhajashajan|zhajashajan]] || [[word:zhajashashan|zhajashashan]] || [[word:zhajashakan|zhajashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajashathaoro|zhajashathaoro]] || [[word:zhajashajaoro|zhajashajaoro]] || [[word:zhajashashaoro|zhajashashaoro]] || [[word:zhajashakaoro|zhajashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
